approval_policies_condition_check.name: approval_policies_condition_check
approval_policies_condition_check.value: ("approval_policies"."condition_field" IS NULL AND "approval_policies"."condition_operator" IS NULL AND "approval_policies"."condition_value" IS NULL) OR ("approval_policies"."condition_field" IS NOT NULL AND "approval_policies"."condition_operator" IS NOT NULL AND "approval_policies"."condition_value" IS NOT NULL)

meetings_deal_or_inquiry_check.name: meetings_deal_or_inquiry_check
meetings_deal_or_inquiry_check.value: "meetings"."deal_id" IS NOT NULL OR "meetings"."inquiry_id" IS NOT NULL

requests_origin_check.name: requests_origin_check
requests_origin_check.value: ("requests"."origin_type" = 'manual' AND "requests"."origin_policy_id" IS NULL AND "requests"."origin_trigger_action" IS NULL AND "requests"."origin_trigger_entity_id" IS NULL) OR ("requests"."origin_type" = 'system' AND "requests"."origin_policy_id" IS NOT NULL AND "requests"."origin_trigger_action" IS NOT NULL AND "requests"."origin_trigger_entity_id" IS NOT NULL)
